calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dae Hee Kim, Esq. of the Law Offices of Dae Hee Kim, T:213.700.3231, for defendants/moving party, by Court Call;
David A. Butler, Jr. of the Law Offices of David Butler, T:650.873.3750, for plaintiff/opposing party, by Court Call.

RULING: The Court did not receive notice that the tentative ruling was contested. The Court allowed arguments. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS EMMANUEL SEMANA and WILMA SEMANA'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs as follows:

Defendants' motion is DENIED under CCP 128.5; defendants have not shown that plaintiff's actions were "totally and completely without merit or for the sole purpose of harassing." (See id.) The motion for costs under CCP 1026 is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE as prematurely filed. No attorney fees are awarded to either side. The parties are directed to meet and confer in an attempt to resolve the matter before another costs motion is filed; they are to consider whether the amount at issue is worth further expenditure of their and the Court's time.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
